# hetzner_reset (Ephemeral Resource)

Executes a server reset. This is an ephemeral resource that triggers a one-time action and does not persist state.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `server_number` (Number) The server number to reset.
- `type` (String) Reset type: "sw" (software), "hw" (hardware), or "man" (manual).

### Read-Only

- `server_ip` (String) Server main IPv4 address (returned after reset).
- `server_ipv6_net` (String) Server IPv6 network (returned after reset).
